  "findings": [
    "CSST gas line not bonded to electrical grounding electrode system",
    "Missing bonding conductor/connection at CSST gas piping",
    "Non-compliant with NEC 250.104 bonding requirements for gas piping"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved bonding jumper from CSST gas line to grounding electrode system per NEC 250.104",
    "Verify continuity and connection to equipment grounding conductor",
    "Inspect and test bonding path before closeout"
  ],
  "rationale": "CSST gas piping must be bonded to the grounding electrode system per NEC 250.104; absence of bonding at rough-complete stage is a defective, non-compliant condition creating shock/fire hazard.",
  "references": ["NEC 250.104", "NEC 250.30"]
}
